projects.title: Sentiment Detection via Vision: A Novel Approach
projects.summary: Improved facial sentiment classification by developing attention-guided CNN training that focuses on pixel-level facial contributions.
projects.details: Designed attention mechanisms to analyze per-pixel contributions to sentiment predictions, guiding the CNN to concentrate on semantically relevant facial regions during training. Achieved measurable improvements in classification accuracy over standard baselines. Highlights the intersection of explainability and performance in deep learning.

projects.title: Predictive Modeling with Deep Neural Networks & Regression
projects.summary: Built high-accuracy predictive models for purchase prediction, delay forecasting, demand estimation, and loan propensity — ranking 1st in multiple data science competitions.
projects.details: Applied advanced deep learning and regression techniques to real-world tabular data problems across multiple domains (retail, logistics, restaurant demand). Achieved top-1 accuracy in several competitions, demonstrating strong applied ML research skills. Models were designed for business intelligence deployment.

projects.title: Multi-Task Autonomous Mobile Robot
projects.summary: Designed and built a fully integrated robot capable of autonomous maze navigation, object manipulation, and vision-based sorting.
projects.details: End-to-end robotics project integrating perception, planning, and control. Used real-time computer vision for shape and color recognition to enable autonomous object sorting. The robot autonomously navigated mazes and performed pick-and-place tasks, demonstrating strong system integration from sensor input to actuation.
